subjects.description: team of firefighters moving through earthquake rubble
subjects.appearance_details: adult rescue workers in soot-dusted protective gear, helmets, face shields, gloves, oxygen packs, reflective striping, and heavy boots
subjects.relationship: primary rescue team searching for civilians after a citywide earthquake
subjects.location: foreground and midground streets beside collapsed concrete, twisted rebar, and damaged vehicles
subjects.relative_size: human scale, small against ruined skyscrapers but visually dominant in the rescue foreground
subjects.orientation: moving forward through debris toward trapped civilians and unstable structures
subjects.pose: crouching, climbing, bracing, and signaling while carrying rescue tools
subjects.action: race across broken pavement, scan rubble, coordinate signals, and begin a careful rescue operation
subjects.state_changes: dust coats gear more heavily; flashlights switch on as daylight fades; team formation tightens around a rescue point
subjects.clothing: firefighter turnout coats, pants, helmets, gloves, boots, harnesses, and reflective safety bands
subjects.expression: urgent, determined, focused, and controlled under pressure
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: varied human skin tones partly obscured by soot, dust, masks, and harsh emergency light
subjects.facial_features: partly visible eyes, tense brows, ash-marked cheeks, and helmet shadows

subjects.appearance_details: civil engineers in hard hats, high visibility vests, work gloves, tablets, radios, and portable measuring equipment
subjects.relationship: support team working near the firefighters to prevent further collapse
subjects.location: midground near a cracked bridge support and damaged utility corridor
subjects.relative_size: human scale, secondary figures amid large broken structures
subjects.orientation: facing damaged supports, leaning over equipment and pointing toward stress fractures
subjects.pose: kneeling, standing, bracing temporary supports, and checking readings
subjects.action: inspect fractures, deploy braces, radio warnings, and guide rescue crews away from unsafe zones
subjects.state_changes: portable lights come on; temporary supports lock into place; warning gestures redirect firefighters
subjects.clothing: hard hats, reflective vests, rugged pants, gloves, and work boots
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: varied skin tones with dust, sweat, and emergency light reflections
subjects.facial_features: focused eyes, tight mouths, protective goggles, and radio headsets

subjects.description: bustling metropolis devastated by a massive earthquake
subjects.appearance_details: cracked skyscrapers, falling glass, collapsed bridge spans, fires, smoke plumes, dust clouds, damaged cars, broken signs, and emergency lights
subjects.relationship: disaster environment surrounding the rescue operation
subjects.location: entire background cityscape and street canyon
subjects.relative_size: enormous, dwarfing all people and vehicles
subjects.orientation: vertical towers fractured above streets, bridge segments angled downward into smoke
subjects.pose: unstable urban landscape with debris settling and flames spreading in controlled cinematic distance
subjects.action: crumbles, sheds dust, burns in scattered pockets, and shifts from late day chaos into night rescue lighting
subjects.state_changes: dust expands then thins; fires brighten as daylight fades; emergency lights become more visible
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: concrete, glass, steel, smoke, flame, asphalt, and rubble with gritty realistic detail

background_setting: A major city after a huge earthquake, with damaged skyscrapers, collapsed bridges, cracked streets, drifting dust, scattered fires, emergency vehicles, and civilians implied by rescue activity but not shown in graphic distress.

lighting.conditions: Starts in smoky late afternoon sunlight, shifts toward dusk, and ends with blue night tones, orange fires, white searchlights, and red emergency flashes cutting through dust.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Starts in smoky late afternoon sunlight, shifts toward dusk, and ends with blue night tones, orange fires, white searchlights, and red emergency flashes cutting through dust.

aesthetics.composition: High stakes disaster cinema, large scale urban destruction, grounded rescue realism, smoky atmosphere, urgent movement, and strong contrast between warm fires and cool evening shadows.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: High stakes disaster cinema, large scale urban destruction, grounded rescue realism, smoky atmosphere, urgent movement, and strong contrast between warm fires and cool evening shadows.

cinematography.camera_motion: Wide establishing disaster shot that pushes into street level rescue action, handheld urgency with controlled shake, deep perspective down a ruined avenue, and sharp focus on rescuers against monumental damage.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

style_medium: Photorealistic live action super disaster text-to-video.
artistic_style: Cinematic blockbuster realism with dense smoke, debris physics, emergency lighting, and dramatic but non-graphic rescue emphasis.
context: A massive earthquake has just struck a crowded metropolis, and emergency teams begin a race against time to save trapped civilians while engineers stabilize critical infrastructure.

actions.description: A wide view reveals cracked towers, a collapsed bridge, dust rolling through streets, and firefighters entering the ruined avenue.
Firefighters climb over rubble while engineers brace a damaged support and radio safety directions through smoke and sirens.
Daylight fades into night rescue lighting as search beams lock onto debris and the teams converge on a careful extraction point.

segments.description: Establish the devastated metropolis immediately after the earthquake, with skyscrapers damaged, bridge spans down, fires starting, and firefighters entering frame.
segments.key_changes: Dust expands, debris settles, and the rescue team becomes visible in the foreground.
segments.camera: Wide aerial-to-street push in with slight disaster shake.

segments.description: Track firefighters and engineers working in parallel through rubble, smoke, cracked pavement, and unstable infrastructure.
segments.key_changes: Engineers place supports, firefighters signal, smoke thickens, and emergency vehicles flash in the haze.
segments.camera: Low street-level tracking shot with handheld urgency and foreground debris parallax.

segments.description: The city darkens into a night rescue setup as teams gather around a rubble pocket under searchlights.
segments.key_changes: Warm daylight drops, blue night appears, searchlights intensify, and the rescue operation focuses.
segments.camera: Slow push toward the rescue point, ending on firefighters framed by lights, smoke, and ruined towers.

temporal_caption: A massive earthquake devastates a metropolis while firefighters and engineers move from first chaos into a focused night rescue operation.
audio_description: Deep rumbling aftershocks, falling debris, distant alarms, crackling fires, radio chatter, heavy boots on rubble, and urgent sirens through smoky air.
